summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a May ’77 classic, highlighted by a scorching Help/Knot sequence, emotive Comes A Time and stellar Peggy‑O.
review: The recording is a clean, crisp soundboard source that lets the band’s radiant May‑1977 energy shine through. Reviewers rave about the blazing Help > Slipknot! transition, the tear‑jerking Comes A Time performance, and the sweet Peggy‑O, while noting the relaxed groove of the whole set.

ai_rating.rationale: Over a dozen reviews uniformly praise both the musical performance and the high‑quality soundboard recording, with only one neutral 3‑star comment; this yields an overall rating in the top tier.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, crisp mix with minimal crowd bleed; a cleaned‑up version that removed tuning‑ups and excess audience noise while preserving ambience. No significant dropouts or distortion reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe a consistently ‘on’ set with high energy, relaxed groove and seamless transitions typical of the May‑1977 run; the second half especially shines with strong jams and emotional ballads.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for fiery guitar work on TMNS and a soulful, tear‑inducing vocal on Comes A Time; his solo described as ‘smoking’ and a group effort.
